endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available OperationalInsights Rest API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/linkTargets
endpoints.description: Get a list of workspaces which the current user has administrator privileges and are not associated with an Azure Subscription. The subscriptionId parameter in the Url is ignored.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{workspaceName}/operations/{purgeId}
endpoints.description: Gets status of an ongoing purge operation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PURGEID}} with a real purgeid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{workspaceName}/purge
endpoints.description:
Purges data in an Log Analytics workspace by a set of user-defined filters.

In order to manage system resources, purge requests are throttled at 50 requests per hour. You should batch the execution of purge requests by sending a single command whose predicate includes all user identities that require purging. Use the in operator to specify multiple identities. You should run the query prior to using for a purge request to verify that the results are expected.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{workspaceName}/gateways/{gatewayId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{GATEWAYID}} with a real gatewayid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{workspaceName}/listKeys
endpoints.description: Gets the shared keys for a Log Analytics Workspace. These keys are used to connect Microsoft Operational Insights agents to the workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{workspaceName}/regenerateSharedKey
endpoints.description: Regenerates the shared keys for a Log Analytics Workspace. These keys are used to connect Microsoft Operational Insights agents to the workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{workspaceName}/savedSearches
endpoints.description: Gets the saved searches for a given Log Analytics Workspace
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{workspaceName}/savedSearches/{savedSearchId}
endpoints.description: Gets the specified saved search for a given workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SAVEDSEARCHID}} with a real savedsearchid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{workspaceName}/savedSearches/{savedSearchId}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a saved search for a given workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SAVEDSEARCHID}} with a real savedsearchid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{workspaceName}/savedSearches/{savedSearchId}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified saved search in a given workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SAVEDSEARCHID}} with a real savedsearchid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{workspaceName}/schema
endpoints.description: Gets the schema for a given workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{workspaceName}/storageInsightConfigs
endpoints.description: Lists the storage insight instances within a workspace
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{workspaceName}/storageInsightConfigs/{storageInsightName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{STORAGEINSIGHTNAME}} with a real storageinsightname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{workspaceName}/storageInsightConfigs/{storageInsightName}
endpoints.description: Create or update a storage insight.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{STORAGEINSIGHTNAME}} with a real storageinsightname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{workspaceName}/storageInsightConfigs/{storageInsightName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{STORAGEINSIGHTNAME}} with a real storageinsightname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.
